docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BELTRAN, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-21-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY JUNITA ULLOA (FOR PRETRIAL ASSISTANCE ONLY). DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF ADVISED THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT MAILING ADDRESS IS THE ORIGINAL ADDRESS USED. THE CLERK UPDATED IT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR NOV-20-2019 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO:PLAINTIFF - FRANCISCO BELTRAN; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY BELTRAN, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO NOV-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER MAILED TO FRANCISCO MENDOZA-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER SET FOR FEBRUARY 23, 2021 AT 10:00 A.M. DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH POREJUDICE AS SETTLED.
DECLARATION OF FRANCISCO BELTRAN RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, FRANCISCO
DECLARATION UPDATE ON DEFENDANT ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, FRANCISCO $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MENDOZA IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE ASSITED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER PIEDAD BLANCO-KRETCHNER WHO IS ASSISTED BY A LISTENING DEVICE PROVIDED BY THE COURT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES STIPULATE TO AN AGREEMENT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MENDOZA AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN $500.00 A MONTH STARTING JUNE 1, 2020 AND EACH MONTH THEREAFTER THROUGH FEBRUARY 2021 WITH THE FINAL PAYMENT AMOUNT BEING $200.00. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH. A PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 20, 2021 AT 10:00 A,M. DEPARTMENT 506. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY AS DIRECTED STARTING JUNE 1, 2020, PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE THIS MATTER SET FOR HEARING FOR JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THIS HEARING IF THE TERMS OF THIS AGREMENTARE ARE MET. ONCE THE PAYMENTS ARE COMPLETE, JUDGEMENT CREDITOR MUST FILE AN SC290 ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION AND FILE IT DOWNSTAIRS IN ROOM 103. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO BELTRAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE INAISA. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT VACATES THE FEB-2021 DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
